root.sql:
select * from ( select sc_lon_m_rule.account_id , (select account_name from sc_acc_m_account_master where account_id = sc_lon_m_rule.account_id ) as account_name , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , count(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno) as count_mem , sum(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as sum_balance from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' and sc_lon_m_rule.account_id not in ('115120') --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '31/07/2023' /*WHERE*/ group by sc_lon_m_rule.account_id , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date order by sc_lon_m_rule.account_id )
union
select * from ( select sc_lon_m_rule.account_id , (select account_name from sc_acc_m_account_master where account_id = sc_lon_m_rule.account_id )||' (คนค้ำประกัน)' as account_name , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , count(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno) as count_mem , sum(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as sum_balance from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' and sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = '115120' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ('21','25') --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '31/07/2023' /*WHERE*/ group by sc_lon_m_rule.account_id , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date order by sc_lon_m_rule.account_id )
union
select * from ( select sc_lon_m_rule.account_id , (select account_name from sc_acc_m_account_master where account_id = sc_lon_m_rule.account_id )||' (หุ้นค้ำประกัน)' as account_name , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , count(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno) as count_mem , sum(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as sum_balance from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' and sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = '115120' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type in ('21','25') --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '31/07/2023' /*WHERE*/ group by sc_lon_m_rule.account_id , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date order by sc_lon_m_rule.account_id )
union
select * from ( select '3' as account_id , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc as account_name , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date , count(distinct sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no) as count_mem , sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_balance) as sum_balance from sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code where sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loan_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loan_code = '1' and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date = '!confirm_date!' group by sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc )
union
select * from ( select '01' as account_id , 'จำนวนสมาชิกทั้งหมด' as account_name , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , count(sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no) as count_mem , sum(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as sum_balance from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_cls_confirm_data where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '31/07/2023' /*WHERE*/ group by sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date )
union
select * from ( select '02' as account_id , 'สมาชิกที่ไม่ได้กู้' as account_name , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , count(sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no) as count_mem , sum(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as sum_balance from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_cls_confirm_data where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no not in (select membership_no from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and data_group = 'LON' and data_balance > '0' and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date ) and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '31/07/2023' /*WHERE*/ group by sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date )
union
select * from ( select '9' as account_id , 'รวมจำนวนทั้งสิ้น (มีหนี้)' account_name , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , count(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno) as count_mem , sum(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as sum_balance from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '31/07/2023' /*WHERE*/ group by sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date )
--รายงานมี Formatting Rules
